title: The Fiancée - Paths of Corruption
description:
DESIRE, PRESSURE, AND A DANGEROUS GAMEEmily (name can be changed) visits her fiancé’s father to announce their upcoming wedding and their future move to Mauritius.

But after an unexpected accident, her fiancé must leave early—forcing Emily to stay alone with her future father-in-law. 

BOUNDARIES, TEMPTATION, AND SECRETSWhat should have been a brief visit turns into an uneasy recovery in a house filled with tension. 
A lingering look. 
A compliment said too close. 
Moments she should walk away from… but doesn’t.

As days go by, the atmosphere grows more intimate, the boundaries blur, and Emily must face a temptation she never anticipated. With her fiancé thousands of kilometers away, her choices now carry weight—and consequences. 

MULTIPLE ENDINGS AND A CORRUPTION PATHThe Fiancée - Paths of Corruption is a mature visual novel where Emily’s loyalty, desires, and moral limits evolve based on your decisions. 
Resist, surrender, or fall into corruption—each route leads to a different ending.

ABOUT 'THE FIANCÉE - PATHS OF CORRUPTION'This game contains suggestive content, mature dialog, forbidden fantasies, and sexually charged situations between consenting adults. 
All characters are over 18. 
No future weddings were harmed in the making of this story—though some may be permanently altered.
description_short: A mature branching visual novel where your choices guide Emily’s descent into temptation or resistance as she recovers in her fiancé’s family home under the watch of a dangerously charismatic father-in-law.
